# SkillGod — Copilot Agent instructions

On coding tasks:
1. Prefer MCP tools sg_inject_context / sg_capture_turn when available in Agent Mode
2. Otherwise run: sg inject "<task>" and after work: sg capture --task "..." --output "..."
3. Treat project digests in AGENTS.md, SKILLGOD.md, and .github/copilot-instructions.md as authoritative history

Do not invent prior architectural decisions; use SkillGod memory when present.
